name: Wired gauge

en.when_to_use: Use it when one value within a bounded range should feel like a hand-drawn analog instrument, for example launch readiness, capacity, temperature, confidence, or a bonus target. It is best for a single expressive reading; use bars for comparing several values, a line chart for change over time, or a precise numeric table when exact lookup matters more than visual character.
en.why_valuable: A sketch-style gauge needs a coherent arc, ticks, range normalization, needle geometry, readable endpoints, and a component frame that still scales cleanly. The published wired-elements package has no <wired-gauge>, so this verified fallback mounts its real shadow-based <wired-card> and <wired-progress> elements and supplies only the missing analog dial as a small inline SVG.

data_in.note: data represents one bounded reading. value is clamped to min-max; min defaults to 0, and max defaults to min+100 when omitted or not greater than min. The needle and <wired-progress> both use the normalized (value-min)/(max-min) proportion. label and unit affect display text only.

schema.value: number -- current reading, clamped to min-max
schema.max?: number -- upper endpoint, must be greater than min; default min+100
schema.label?: string -- short gauge title; displays "Current level" when omitted
schema.unit?: string -- compact suffix such as %, kWh, °C, or pts; default empty

spec.note: The wired card is at most 560px wide and grows naturally with its label, 320:235 SVG dial, and 42px wired progress strip. It scales down on narrow carriers and uses no vh, percentage height, external font, or carrier measurement.

when_to_use: 需要把一个有上下界的数值画成手绘感模拟仪表时用它，例如上线准备度、容量、温度、置信度或奖金目标。它最适合突出一个有表现力的读数；比较多个值应用条形图，展示时间变化应用折线图，精确查数比视觉个性更重要时应用数值表。
why_valuable: 手绘风仪表需要让圆弧、刻度、区间归一化、指针几何与端点标签保持一致，同时组件边框还要能干净缩放。已发布的 wired-elements 并没有 <wired-gauge>，因此这个已验证 fallback 挂载其真实、自带 shadow 的 <wired-card> 与 <wired-progress>，只用一个小型内联 SVG 补上缺失的模拟表盘。

data_in.note: data 表示一个有界读数。value 会夹到 min–max；min 默认 0，max 省略或不大于 min 时取 min+100。指针和 <wired-progress> 都按 (value-min)/(max-min) 归一化；label 与 unit 只改变显示文本。

schema.value: number —— 当前读数，会夹到 min–max
schema.max?: number —— 区间上界，必须大于 min；默认 min+100
schema.label?: string —— 仪表短标题；省略时显示 “Current level”
schema.unit?: string —— 紧凑单位后缀，例如 %、kWh、°C 或 pts；默认空

spec.note: wired card 最大宽 560px，随标题、320:235 SVG 表盘和 42px wired progress 条自然增高；窄载体内等比缩小，无 vh、百分比高度、外部字体或载体测量。

example._why: 68/100 的上线准备度能同时验证非端点指针角度、手绘进度填充、百分比标签、端点与单位排版。

uplink: display-only；只展示 data 中的有界读数与本地归一化结果，不监听输入、选择或提交，也不向 AI 回传任何状态。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；<wired-card> 与 <wired-progress> 均完成升级，表盘、68% 指针、刻度和手绘进度条可见
carriers.widget: supported:只把 parent 改为 shadowRoot；包装与两个 wired 元素各自使用 shadow，依赖仅在 ESM import 时加载，无运行时 asset/theme/i18n fetch
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一挂载点；connect-src 被禁不影响，因为组件无运行时数据或资源请求

isolation.evidence: wired-elements@3.0.0-rc.6 /+esm 尾部确认只导出并副作用注册包内 custom elements，明确没有 WiredGauge/<wired-gauge>，但包含 WiredCard 与 WiredProgress；3.0.0-rc.6 的 wired-progress 与 wired-card 类型/实现确认 value/min/max/percentage、elevation 与各自 shadow。两者都内联 SVG/CSS，无 fetch、字体、主题、i18n 或外部资产。包装 CSS/DOM 位于自有 shadow；card/progress 各自也有 shadow。globalEvents=conditional 仅因 wired-card 在 ResizeObserver 不可用时回退到可清理的 window resize 监听；现代 Chromium 使用 ResizeObserver。artifact rendered-verified.
